---
title: "dedupe_corrections.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/data/dedupe_corrections.py"
loc: 20
complexity: 2
logic_score: 6.80
style_score: 3.95
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 4.58
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating internal logic. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)

### Exports
Internal logic only.
